news.title: India's central bank revives push to isolate banks from crypto: Report
news.summary: The Indian central bank reportedly urged lawmakers to keep banks insulated from crypto and private stablecoins while preserving room for regulated tokenization.</

news.title: Irish authorities seize another 500 Bitcoin, bringing 2026 total to 1,500 BTC
news.summary: Irish authorities recovered 500 Bitcoin in criminal proceeds, bringing the total seized by the Criminal Assets Bureau to about $92 million in BTC for 2026.
